TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Te Matay ising == Te Matay ising (Dr. Matthew Dickson) saka tosa itinaay Taywan isingan sinkiwsi no Inkiris Ciwlo kiwkay. Te Matay ising nai 1871 miheca 2 folad 10 romi'ad tahini i Taywan cingra, i 1878 miheca 1 folad 8 romi'ad misawad minokay i Inkiris, kaitinian ningra i Taywan 7 miheca. I 1874 miheca 12 folad 22 romi'ad tayni Taywan, ikor malahakelong t ofa'inay minokay i kitakit. Maocor ci Te Matay ising itira i Focen isingan, mipadang ci Ma Yokop isingan, tangasa i 1871 miheca 11 folad miliyas ci Te Matay ising to Taywan, citodong to kalodemak no isingan. Tadamaan ko ising a fana' ningra, mapatireng ko kasasinga'ay to malatapangay, ngalef i satakaraway no malatapangay ko katadamaan no kanga'ay ningra. I 1876 miheca 7 folad 11 romi'ad, sacisowal sa i tilid no tikami: " 'Aloman ko tayniay paisingay tamdaw, kanga'ayen no adadaay. Malitosa ko adadaay ko mi'acaay to 'olican tilid, nai dafak tangasa dadaya ko pisa'osi to 'olic. ‚Ä¶ pinapina romi'ad manengneng ako ko pina adadaay tamdaw. Oya fafahi no malatapangay, ira ko ta'angay masafena'ay i padahaw nangra , caay pakanga'ay miadah ko kangpoyak, mangatangata to mapatay ko 'orip. Tadamaan ko adada ningra, saranikay sa misatemitemik ko faloco', mitiya o kasoy ko kakodos. Pakayni i piadah no mako, sanga'ay sato ko adada a tanektek, saromi'ami'ad sato a fangcal. Oya sa a malatapangay matira to ko kaciadada. Masamatira, longocan ako cingra to sapipaliyas to fiw malopaisingan kaitiraan. Mihayda cingra a misaharateng, ocoran ningra ko cecay a malatapangay misolap to kasacecay a fiw, ta mipaca'of takowanan. Nanay onini a demak ira ko Kawas a matayal, mapadama ko salo'afang no finawlan." Minanamay i kalaising ni Te Matay ising ira ci Su Jiayin. Minokay tayra i Inkiris kitakit ci Te Matay ising, ci Su Jiayin to ko itiraay i Focen (Taynan), ikor tayra to cingra i Ciayi patireng to pa'acaay to sapaiyo, o "Teantang" ko paya. I 1885 miheca tangasa 1887 miheca, ci Su Jiayin malaciwlo no Focen kiwkay. I "Teantang" minanam to isingan, ikor itira i Lukang Yuanlin patireng to paisingan ira ci Li Pen (Tawsen, Tingtosi Li Cui a wawa), pangangan "Huayte tang" (ikor Huayte isingan). O ma'imeray misarocod to tayal no isingan ci Te Matay ising, mararid midama to tayal no kiwkay, ato tayra i kasaniyaro' misolap ato miadah to adadaay, o nirakatan maledef i kasaniyaro' no timolan 'amisan kiwkay. Pasiina kiwkay ko paratoh to nidemakan i kasaniyaro'. Tinako, nitilidan ni Wan Ronghua foksi "Inkiris ciwlo kiwkay roma kanatal nisintingan moetepay miheca likisi" (Edward Band: Working His Purpose out‚Ä¶P.85), masowal cingra to pipaso'elin no Ganga Lintau tamdaw. Sowal sa: Ganga Lin kakeridan tapang, talacowa o Silaya finacadan kora tamdaw, nika miliyang to piparatoh i niyah finacadan tamdaw, wata ko pifo'ot, pasi Taywanfo ko pakokot, nika o kadafo sa ningra paso'elin aca saka, laplepen ningra ko kadafo toya lalo', lalangen ko wawa to fafahiyan a mitoor‚Ä¶ nika ikor sato o niyah mitelek mitoor paso'elin to niparatohan. Miliyas minokay tayra i Inkiris ca Te Matay ising mararamod, Taynan kiwsikay kapot ci Gan Weilin, Buckley aci Si Taypi paikor to sasowalen, minengneng i "Taynan kiwsikay tilidan" saka 22 liyad, i 1878 miheca 1 folad 16 romi'ad saka 1 felih caay to tiliden. To nika awa to ni Te Matay ising oya paisingan pacena' sa to sakiising, tangasa i 1879 miheca 1 folad 14 romi'ad ira to ni An pitiro ising tayni Taywan a mitaka itiya.
S.PHON: == t…ô mataj isiŇč == t…ô mataj isiŇč (…¨~…ģr. mattńß…ôw …¨~…ģi ¶kso~un) saka to~usa itinaaj tajwan isiŇčan sinkiwsi no~u inkiris ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj. t…ô mataj isiŇč nai **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ tańßini i tajwan ¶iŇčra, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ misawa…¨~…ģ mino~ukaj i inkiris, kaitinian niŇčra i tajwan * mińß…ô ¶a. i **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ tajni tajwan, iko~ur ma…ĺańßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč t o~ufa °inaj mino~ukaj i kitakit. mao~u ¶o~ur ¶i t…ô mataj isiŇč itira i fo~u ¶…ôn isiŇčan, mipa…¨~…ģaŇč ¶i ma jo~uko~up isiŇčan, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ mi…ĺijas ¶i t…ô mataj isiŇč to~u tajwan, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ka…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u isiŇčan. ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u isiŇč a fana ° niŇčra, mapatir…ôŇč ko~u kasasiŇča °aj to~u ma…ĺatapaŇčaj, Ňča…ĺ…ôf i satakarawaj no~u ma…ĺatapaŇčaj ko~u kata…¨~…ģamaan no~u kaŇča °aj niŇčra. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa i ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u tikami: " °a…ĺo~uman ko~u tajniaj paisiŇčaj tam…¨~…ģaw, kaŇča °aj…ôn no~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj. ma…ĺito~usa ko~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj ko~u mi °a ¶aaj to~u °o~u…ĺi ¶an ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, nai …¨~…ģafak taŇčasa …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja ko~u pisa °o~usi to~u °o~u…ĺi ¶. * pinapina ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ako~u ko~u pina a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj tam…¨~…ģaw. o~uja fafańßi no~u ma…ĺatapaŇčaj, ira ko~u ta °aŇčaj masaf…ôna °aj i pa…¨~…ģańßaw naŇčra , ¶aaj pakaŇča °aj mia…¨~…ģańß ko~u kaŇčpo~ujak, maŇčataŇčata to~u mapataj ko~u °o~urip. ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa niŇčra, saranikaj sa misat…ômit…ômik ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, mitija o~u kaso~uj ko~u kako~u…¨~…ģo~us. pakajni i pia…¨~…ģańß no~u mako~u, saŇča °aj sato~u ko~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa a tan…ôkt…ôk, saro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ sato~u a faŇč ¶a…ĺ. o~uja sa a ma…ĺatapaŇčaj matira to~u ko~u ka ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa. masamatira, …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶an ako~u ¶iŇčra to~u sapipa…ĺijas to~u fiw ma…ĺo~upaisiŇčan kaitiraan. mińßaj…¨~…ģa ¶iŇčra a misańßarat…ôŇč, o~u ¶o~uran niŇčra ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a ma…ĺatapaŇčaj miso~u…ĺap to~u kasa ¶…ô ¶aj a fiw, ta mipa ¶a °o~uf tako~uwanan. nanaj o~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak ira ko~u kawas a mataja…ĺ, mapa…¨~…ģama ko~u sa…ĺo~u °afaŇč no~u finaw…ĺan." minanamaj i ka…ĺaisiŇč ni t…ô mataj isiŇč ira ¶i so~u~u *iajin. mino~ukaj tajra i inkiris kitakit ¶i t…ô mataj isiŇč, ¶i so~u~u *iajin to~u ko~u itiraaj i fo~u ¶…ôn (tajnan), iko~ur tajra to~u ¶iŇčra i ¶iaji patir…ôŇč to~u pa °a ¶aaj to~u sapaijo~u, o~u "t…ôantaŇč" ko~u paja. i **** mińß…ô ¶a taŇčasa **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶i so~u~u *iajin ma…ĺa ¶iw…ĺo~u no~u fo~u ¶…ôn kiwkaj. i "t…ôantaŇč" minanam to~u isiŇčan, iko~ur itira i …ĺo~u~ukaŇč jo~u~uan…ĺin patir…ôŇč to~u paisiŇčan ira ¶i …ĺi p…ôn (taws…ôn, tiŇčto~usi …ĺi ¶o~u~ui a wawa), paŇčaŇčan "ńßo~u~uajt…ô taŇč" (iko~ur ńßo~u~uajt…ô isiŇčan). o~u ma °im…ôraj misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģ to~u taja…ĺ no~u isiŇčan ¶i t…ô mataj isiŇč, marari…¨~…ģ mi…¨~…ģama to~u taja…ĺ no~u kiwkaj, ato~u tajra i kasanijaro~u ° miso~u…ĺap ato~u mia…¨~…ģańß to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj, o~u nirakatan ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf i kasanijaro~u ° no~u timo~u…ĺan °amisan kiwkaj. pasiina kiwkaj ko~u parato~uńß to~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan i kasanijaro~u °. tinako~u, niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan ni wan ro~uŇčńßo~u~ua fo~uksi "inkiris ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj ro~uma kanata…ĺ nisintiŇčan mo~u…ôt…ôpaj mińß…ô ¶a …ĺikisi" (…ô…¨~…ģwar…¨~…ģ b~b~van…¨~…ģ: wo~urkiŇč ńßis po~u~urpo~us…ô o~uo~u~ut*p.**), maso~uwa…ĺ ¶iŇčra to~u pipaso~u °…ô…ĺin no~u *aŇča …ĺintao~u~u tam…¨~…ģaw. so~uwa…ĺ sa: *aŇča …ĺin kak…ôri…¨~…ģan tapaŇč, ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa o~u si…ĺaja fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~ura tam…¨~…ģaw, nika mi…ĺijaŇč to~u piparato~uńß i nijańß fina ¶a…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw, wata ko~u pifo~u °o~ut, pasi tajwanfo~u ko~u pako~uko~ut, nika o~u ka…¨~…ģafo~u sa niŇčra paso~u °…ô…ĺin a ¶a saka, …ĺap…ĺ…ôp…ôn niŇčra ko~u ka…¨~…ģafo~u to~uja …ĺa…ĺo~u °, …ĺa…ĺaŇč…ôn ko~u wawa to~u fafańßijan a mito~uo~ur* nika iko~ur sato~u o~u nijańß mit…ô…ĺ…ôk mito~uo~ur paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u niparato~uńßan. mi…ĺijas mino~ukaj tajra i inkiris ¶a t…ô mataj isiŇč mararamo~u…¨~…ģ, tajnan kiwsikaj kapo~ut ¶i *an w…ôi…ĺin, b~b~vo~u~u ¶k…ĺ…ôj a ¶i si tajpi paiko~ur to~u saso~uwa…ĺ…ôn, min…ôŇčn…ôŇč i "tajnan kiwsikaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan" saka ** …ĺija…¨~…ģ, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ saka * f…ô…ĺińß ¶aaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ…ôn. to~u nika awa to~u ni t…ô mataj isiŇč o~uja paisiŇčan pa ¶…ôna ° sa to~u sakiisiŇč, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ira to~u ni an pitiro~u isiŇč tajni tajwan a mitaka itija.
S.FORM: == Te Matay ising == Te Matay ising (Dr. Matthew Dickson) saka tosa itinaay Taywan isingan sinkiwsi no Inkiris Ciwlo kiwkay. Te Matay ising nai 1871 miheca 2 folad 10 romi'ad tahini i Taywan cingra, i 1878 miheca 1 folad 8 romi'ad misawad minokay i Inkiris, kaitinian ningra i Taywan 7 miheca. I 1874 miheca 12 folad 22 romi'ad tayni Taywan, ikor malahakelong t ofa'inay minokay i kitakit. Maocor ci Te Matay ising itira i Focen isingan, mipadang ci Ma Yokop isingan, tangasa i 1871 miheca 11 folad miliyas ci Te Matay ising to Taywan, citodong to kalodemak no isingan. Tadamaan ko ising a fana' ningra, mapatireng ko kasasinga'ay to malatapangay, ngalef i satakaraway no malatapangay ko katadamaan no kanga'ay ningra. I 1876 miheca 7 folad 11 romi'ad, sacisowal sa i tilid no tikami: " 'Aloman ko tayniay paisingay tamdaw, kanga'ayen no adadaay. Malitosa ko adadaay ko mi'acaay to 'olican tilid, nai dafak tangasa dadaya ko pisa'osi to 'olic. ‚Ä¶ pinapina romi'ad manengneng ako ko pina adadaay tamdaw. Oya fafahi no malatapangay, ira ko ta'angay masafena'ay i padahaw nangra , caay pakanga'ay miadah ko kangpoyak, mangatangata to mapatay ko 'orip. Tadamaan ko adada ningra, saranikay sa misatemitemik ko faloco', mitiya o kasoy ko kakodos. Pakayni i piadah no mako, sanga'ay sato ko adada a tanektek, saromi'ami'ad sato a fangcal. Oya sa a malatapangay matira to ko kaciadada. Masamatira, longocan ako cingra to sapipaliyas to fiw malopaisingan kaitiraan. Mihayda cingra a misaharateng, ocoran ningra ko cecay a malatapangay misolap to kasacecay a fiw, ta mipaca'of takowanan. Nanay onini a demak ira ko Kawas a matayal, mapadama ko salo'afang no finawlan." Minanamay i kalaising ni Te Matay ising ira ci Su Jiayin. Minokay tayra i Inkiris kitakit ci Te Matay ising, ci Su Jiayin to ko itiraay i Focen (Taynan), ikor tayra to cingra i Ciayi patireng to pa'acaay to sapaiyo, o "Teantang" ko paya. I 1885 miheca tangasa 1887 miheca, ci Su Jiayin malaciwlo no Focen kiwkay. I "Teantang" minanam to isingan, ikor itira i Lukang Yuanlin patireng to paisingan ira ci Li Pen (Tawsen, Tingtosi Li Cui a wawa), pangangan "Huayte tang" (ikor Huayte isingan). O ma'imeray misarocod to tayal no isingan ci Te Matay ising, mararid midama to tayal no kiwkay, ato tayra i kasaniyaro' misolap ato miadah to adadaay, o nirakatan maledef i kasaniyaro' no timolan 'amisan kiwkay. Pasiina kiwkay ko paratoh to nidemakan i kasaniyaro'. Tinako, nitilidan ni Wan Ronghua foksi "Inkiris ciwlo kiwkay roma kanatal nisintingan moetepay miheca likisi" (Edward Band: Working His Purpose out‚Ä¶P.85), masowal cingra to pipaso'elin no Ganga Lintau tamdaw. Sowal sa: Ganga Lin kakeridan tapang, talacowa o Silaya finacadan kora tamdaw, nika miliyang to piparatoh i niyah finacadan tamdaw, wata ko pifo'ot, pasi Taywanfo ko pakokot, nika o kadafo sa ningra paso'elin aca saka, laplepen ningra ko kadafo toya lalo', lalangen ko wawa to fafahiyan a mitoor‚Ä¶ nika ikor sato o niyah mitelek mitoor paso'elin to niparatohan. Miliyas minokay tayra i Inkiris ca Te Matay ising mararamod, Taynan kiwsikay kapot ci Gan Weilin, Buckley aci Si Taypi paikor to sasowalen, minengneng i "Taynan kiwsikay tilidan" saka 22 liyad, i 1878 miheca 1 folad 16 romi'ad saka 1 felih caay to tiliden. To nika awa to ni Te Matay ising oya paisingan pacena' sa to sakiising, tangasa i 1879 miheca 1 folad 14 romi'ad ira to ni An pitiro ising tayni Taywan a mitaka itiya.

fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, mitija o~u kaso~uj ko~u kako~u…¨~…ģo~us. pakajni i pia…¨~…ģańß no~u mako~u, saŇča °aj sato~u ko~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa a tan…ôkt…ôk, saro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ sato~u a faŇč ¶a…ĺ. o~uja sa a finaw…ĺan." minanamaj i ka…ĺaisiŇč ni t…ô mataj isiŇč ira ¶i so~u~u *iajin. mino~ukaj tajra i inkiris kitakit ¶i t…ô mataj isiŇč, ¶i so~u~u *iajin to~u ko~u itiraaj i fo~u ¶…ôn (tajnan), iko~ur tajra to~u ¶iŇčra i ¶iaji patir…ôŇč to~u pa °a ¶aaj to~u sapaijo~u, o~u "t…ôantaŇč" ko~u paja. i **** mińß…ô ¶a taŇčasa **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶i so~u~u *iajin ma…ĺa ¶iw…ĺo~u no~u fo~u ¶…ôn kiwkaj. i "t…ôantaŇč" minanam to~u isiŇčan, iko~ur itira i …ĺo~u~ukaŇč jo~u~uan…ĺin patir…ôŇč to~u paisiŇčan ira ¶i …ĺi p…ôn (taws…ôn, tiŇčto~usi …ĺi ¶o~u~ui a wawa), paŇčaŇčan "ńßo~u~uajt…ô taŇč" (iko~ur ńßo~u~uajt…ô isiŇčan). o~u ma °im…ôraj misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģ to~u taja…ĺ no~u isiŇčan ¶i t…ô mataj isiŇč, marari…¨~…ģ mi…¨~…ģama to~u taja…ĺ no~u kiwkaj, ato~u tajra i kasanijaro~u ° miso~u…ĺap ato~u mia…¨~…ģańß to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj, o~u nirakatan ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf i kasanijaro~u ° no~u timo~u…ĺan °amisan kiwkaj. pasiina kiwkaj ko~u parato~uńß to~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan i kasanijaro~u °. tinako~u, niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan ni wan ro~uŇčńßo~u~ua fo~uksi "inkiris ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj ro~uma kanata…ĺ nisintiŇčan mo~u…ôt…ôpaj mińß…ô ¶a …ĺikisi" (…ô…¨~…ģwar…¨~…ģ b~b~van…¨~…ģ: wo~urkiŇč ńßis po~u~urpo~us…ô o~uo~u~ut*p.**), maso~uwa…ĺ ¶iŇčra to~u pipaso~u °…ô…ĺin no~u *aŇča …ĺintao~u~u tam…¨~…ģaw. so~uwa…ĺ sa: *aŇča …ĺin kak…ôri…¨~…ģan tapaŇč, ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa o~u si…ĺaja fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~ura tam…¨~…ģaw, nika mi…ĺijaŇč to~u piparato~uńß i nijańß fina ¶a…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw, wata ko~u pifo~u °o~ut, pasi tajwanfo~u ko~u pako~uko~ut, nika o~u ka…¨~…ģafo~u sa niŇčra paso~u °…ô…ĺin a ¶a saka, …ĺap…ĺ…ôp…ôn niŇčra ko~u ka…¨~…ģafo~u to~uja …ĺa…ĺo~u °, …ĺa…ĺaŇč…ôn ko~u wawa to~u fafańßijan a mito~uo~ur* nika iko~ur sato~u o~u nijańß mit…ô…ĺ…ôk mito~uo~ur paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u niparato~uńßan. mi…ĺijas mino~ukaj tajra i inkiris ¶a t…ô mataj isiŇč mararamo~u…¨~…ģ, tajnan kiwsikaj kapo~ut ¶i *an w…ôi…ĺin, b~b~vo~u~u ¶k…ĺ…ôj a ¶i si tajpi paiko~ur to~u saso~uwa…ĺ…ôn, min…ôŇčn…ôŇč i "tajnan kiwsikaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan" saka ** …ĺija…¨~…ģ, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ saka * f…ô…ĺińß ¶aaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ…ôn. to~u nika awa to~u ni t…ô mataj isiŇč o~uja paisiŇčan pa ¶…ôna ° sa to~u sakiisiŇč, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ira to~u ni an pitiro~u isiŇč tajni tajwan a mitaka itija.
